new_rules:
KSERC (Terms and Conditions for Determination of Tariff) (Second Amendment) Regulations, 2024
KSERC (Terms and Conditions for Determination of Tariff) Regulations, 2021

These recent amendments dictate strict adherence to normative O&M limits and prioritize exact uncontrollable vs controllable expense mapping. The AI must explicitly verify costs against these 2021/2024 standards.
tariff_data:
Tariff Order 2024: No.427(D(T)/2023/KSERC (Dated: 2024-12-05)
Tariff Order Extension: No.1935/Con(T)/2024/KSERC (Dated: 2024-06-25)
Tariff Order 2023: No. 427/D(T)/2023/KSERC (Dated: 2023-10-31)

Costs must be validated against the active 2024 base figures or the extended interim boundaries as approved by KSERC.
historical_data: KSERC (Terms and Conditions for Determination of Tariff) Regulations, 2014 are REPEALED and should NOT be used as the primary basis for ongoing 2024/2025 calculations unless specifically addressing legacy delayed truing-up matters. Always default to the 2021 and 2024 frameworks.
